'''ConCare''' was a subsidiary corporation of [[BioTech Industries/Legends|BioTech Industries]], based on [[Rothana/Legends|Rothana]] in [[40 ABY/Legends|40 ABY]]. [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]] inquired about their stock while searching for changes linked to [[Taun We/Legends|Taun We]].
